meta.description: Kingdom security policies. Per-wall overrides in 'walls' section.

filevault.name: FileVault encryption
filevault.description: Full disk encryption must be enabled

firewall.name: Application firewall
firewall.description: macOS application firewall must be enabled

hostname.name: Hostname neutralized
hostname.description: Hostname must not leak personal identity

bonjour.name: Bonjour advertising disabled
bonjour.description: Multicast name advertising must be off

dns_encrypted.name: Encrypted DNS
dns_encrypted.description: DNS queries routed through cloudflared or encrypted provider

ssh_key.name: SSH key exists
ssh_key.description: Ed25519 SSH key must exist for git and fleet operations

wall_credentials.name: Wall-appropriate credentials only
wall_credentials.description: Device must not hold credentials above its wall

hive_key.name: HIVE encryption key present
hive_key.description: HIVE shared encryption key must exist for inter-instance communication

hive_identity.name: HIVE instance identity set
hive_identity.description: Instance must know its identity for HIVE and wall enforcement

diagnostic_sharing.name: Diagnostic data sharing disabled
diagnostic_sharing.description: Apple crash/diagnostic data sharing should be off

file_integrity.name: Critical file integrity
file_integrity.description: Core Kingdom files must match known hashes

wireguard_tunnel.name: WireGuard VPN active
wireguard_tunnel.description: Traffic must exit through a fleet VPS, not direct IP

doh_active.name: DoH proxy resolving
doh_active.description: DNS-over-HTTPS proxy must be actively resolving queries

fleet_reachable.name: Fleet nodes reachable
fleet_reachable.description: All 5 VPS nodes must be SSH-reachable

fleet_fail2ban.name: Fleet fail2ban active
fleet_fail2ban.description: fail2ban must be running on all fleet nodes

fleet_psad.name: Fleet port scan detection
fleet_psad.description: psad must be running on all fleet nodes

fleet_canaries.name: Fleet canaries intact
fleet_canaries.description: All canary files must be present on all fleet nodes

fleet_ssh_hardened.name: Fleet SSH hardened
fleet_ssh_hardened.description: Password authentication must be disabled on all fleet nodes

1.comment: Triarchy — all checks enforced including fleet

2.comment: Fleet — all checks except dns_encrypted (VPS may use system resolver)
